nodes.name: INDEX.md
nodes.summary: Module index for the training.configure subpackage, describing the interactive 'FLIGHT PLAN' configurator that guides users through setting up training runs.

nodes.name: INDEX.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive module index for the training subpackage, covering entry points, config/metadata, training loop orchestrator, collection, learning, evaluation, metrics, dashboard, and subpackages across 9 sections.

nodes.name: conftest.py
nodes.summary: Pytest configuration providing test collection ordering (pool-based tests last) and a session-scoped fixture that resets PyTorch thread count after tests to avoid resource contention.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses pytest hooks (pytest_collection_modifyitems) and a session-scoped autouse fixture to enforce consistent test execution order and thread cleanup.

nodes.name: test_activation_log.py
nodes.summary: Test suite for the activation log system, verifying that row activation headers, power dispatch logging, forced feeder take logging, and single-choice auto-resolution are all recorded correctly.

nodes.name: test_birdfeeder.py
nodes.summary: Comprehensive test suite for the birdfeeder mechanics — reroll distribution, choice-die semantics, feeder reset offers (auto and prompted), and the main gain-food action's interaction with reset decisions.

nodes.name: test_birds_no_eggs_integration.py
nodes.summary: Integration tests for bird-card state encoding and egg-laying mechanics when birds have zero egg capacity, covering state encoding, goal identity visibility, choice pricing, and anti-egg goal skip behavior.

nodes.name: test_bonus_categories.py
nodes.summary: Test suite for bonus card category scoring — tagged bird matching, per-bird payouts, tiered scoring, multiple-card summation, and setup help line formatting.

nodes.name: test_bonus_linear_value.py
nodes.summary: Tests for the bonus card linear value interpolation helpers, verifying monotonicity, flat-tail behavior, and consistency between player-form scoring and the count-based linear value functions.

nodes.name: test_card_table_cache.py
nodes.summary: Tests for the PolicyValueNet card-table inference cache, verifying cache population on eval(), consistency between training and eval forwards, weight-reload invalidation, and gradient flow in training mode.

nodes.name: test_choice_landing_slot.py
nodes.summary: Tests that choice encoding rows correctly embed landing-slot information for play-bird, payment, and setup decision types, and verifies the model's candidate/kept-set embedding mechanics.

nodes.name: test_cloud_runfile.py
nodes.summary: Tests for cloud run-file parsing, covering run-name injection, scratch-dir defaults, explicit checkpoint-dir preservation, bucket validation, S3 URI detection, and final artifact name generation.

nodes.name: test_cloud_s3sync.py
nodes.summary: Tests for the S3Sync offload mechanism, verifying that game chunk uploads trim to the last complete newline and are skipped when no complete line is present.

nodes.name: test_cloud_status.py
nodes.summary: Tests for the cloud status builder, verifying progress-and-opponent fields and final-eval stats serialization in the training run status object.

nodes.name: test_commit_row_pricing.py
nodes.summary: Tests for choice-row delta/pricing stripes in the encoder, verifying hand-growth, egg-capacity, accept-exchange, and bonus-delta fields on main-action and accept-row encoded choices.

nodes.name: test_compat_shim_v0_0.py
nodes.summary: Tests for the v0.0 compat shim — verifying frozen encoding dims match the pinned fixture era, row-by-row encoding parity between legacy and live encoders, and version-predicate routing for PolicyValueNet construction.

nodes.name: test_compat_v0_0.py
nodes.summary: End-to-end compatibility tests loading gzipped v0.0 fixture checkpoints, verifying model-config reading, state-dict loading, forward pass validity, full game play, and choice-layout routing to the frozen registry.

nodes.name: test_compat_v0_1.py
nodes.summary: End-to-end compatibility tests loading gzipped v0.1 fixture checkpoints, verifying explicit version fields, compat-shim classification, forward pass, full game play, and choice-layout routing to the live registry.

nodes.name: test_convergence_charts.py
nodes.summary: Tests for convergence chart logic — score-margin windowing, EWMA series for win-rate/margin/score, opponent-change marker columns, round-trip serialization of change iterations, and Rich dashboard rendering with long histories.

nodes.name: pytest_collection_modifyitems
nodes.summary: Pytest hook that sorts collected test items so pool-based tests (marked 'pool') run last, preventing parallelism bottlenecks from blocking fast tests.

nodes.name: restore_torch_thread_cap
nodes.summary: Session-scoped autouse fixture that resets PyTorch's thread count back to the original value after the test session completes, preventing thread-cap leakage between test runs.

nodes.name: test_row_activation_logs_header_for_every_bird_rightmost_first
nodes.summary: Verifies that activating a row power logs a header entry for every bird on the row, ordered rightmost-first as required by the activation protocol.

nodes.name: test_ask_single_choice_logs_label_and_skips_agent
nodes.summary: Verifies that when Engine.ask receives a single-item choice list the agent is bypassed, the choice label is logged, and the decision is resolved automatically.

nodes.name: test_forced_feeder_take_logs_only_one_choice
nodes.summary: Verifies that a forced feeder take (one food type available) logs exactly one choice entry regardless of how many dice the feeder holds.

nodes.name: test_offer_reset_asks_on_a_single_food_face_and_respects_decline
nodes.summary: Verifies that when the feeder shows only one food face type offer_birdfeeder_reset prompts the agent and correctly leaves the feeder unchanged when the agent declines.

nodes.name: test_main_gain_food_does_not_auto_reroll_a_declined_single_face
nodes.summary: Integration test verifying the full do_gain_food action path: when the agent declines a feeder-reset offer on a single-face feeder the feeder count is not auto-rerolled afterwards.

nodes.name: test_lay_egg_any_anti_egg_goal_skip_adds_no_egg
nodes.summary: Integration test confirming that when an active round goal penalizes eggs and the player skips the lay-any-egg power, no eggs are added to any bird.

nodes.name: test_lay_egg_any_no_room_offers_no_gate
nodes.summary: Integration test verifying that the lay-any-egg power does not present an accept/skip gate when all birds are at egg capacity, ensuring the engine never calls the agent.

nodes.name: test_multiple_bonus_cards_sum
nodes.summary: Verifies that scores from multiple bonus cards accumulate correctly by computing per-card bonus_score values and asserting their sum matches a combined evaluation.

nodes.name: test_setup_help_line_shows_counts_and_deck_share
nodes.summary: Verifies the format_bonus_with_setup_help output contains correct bird counts and deck-share percentages for a static bonus card.

nodes.name: test_weight_reload_then_eval_refreshes_cache
nodes.summary: Verifies that loading a new state dict into PolicyValueNet followed by eval() computes a fresh card table matching a reference net with identical weights, confirming the cache is properly invalidated on weight reload.

nodes.name: test_play_bird_rows_mark_the_landing_slot
nodes.summary: Verifies that PlayBirdChoice encoding rows contain a one-hot habitat stripe and a set board-slot index matching the intended landing slot for two distinct candidate birds.

nodes.name: test_model_kept_set_embedding_sums_card_vectors
nodes.summary: Verifies that the model's kept-set embedding in setup choices sums the card embedding vectors for kept birds exactly, matching a manual lookup and sum from the card table.

nodes.name: test_lay_eggs_action_prices_no_egg_overflow
nodes.summary: Tests the lay-eggs main-action pricing encoder to confirm egg-delta is capped at remaining capacity rather than overflowing when multiple birds share egg slots.

nodes.name: test_accept_rows_price_net_hand_flow
nodes.summary: Tests AcceptExchangeDecision row pricing for net hand-flow by constructing accept rows with card-draw and card-spend PayCostChoice values and asserting the hand-delta and bonus deltas match expected values.

nodes.name: test_play_bird_rows_regenerate_the_v0_0_placement_stripes
nodes.summary: Verifies that the v0.0 compat encoder reproduces the frozen placement stripe layout (habitat one-hot, board-index block, bird one-hot) for PlayBirdChoice rows.

nodes.name: test_from_model_config_routes_by_artifact_version
nodes.summary: Verifies PolicyValueNet.from_model_config routes pre-0.1 artifacts to the frozen v0.0 compat subclass and current artifacts to the live PolicyValueNet class.

nodes.name: test_loaded_net_plays_a_game
nodes.summary: End-to-end smoke test running a complete self-play game using the loaded v0.0 fixture checkpoint to confirm inference produces valid game records.

nodes.name: test_choice_layout_routes_to_the_frozen_registry
nodes.summary: Verifies runmeta routing functions return frozen v0.0 registry values (choice_input_dim, choice_extra) for a pre-0.1 artifact version.

nodes.name: test_loaded_net_plays_a_game
nodes.summary: End-to-end smoke test running a complete self-play game using the loaded v0.1 fixture checkpoint to confirm inference produces valid game records.

nodes.name: test_choice_layout_routes_to_the_live_registry
nodes.summary: Verifies runmeta routing functions return live registry values (encode.choice_input_dim, encode.choice_passthrough_dim) for a v0.1 artifact version.

nodes.name: test_renders_long_history_with_markers
nodes.summary: Smoke test rendering a 50-iteration history with opponent-change markers using the full Rich dashboard stack, verifying the output is non-empty.

nodes.name: test_winrate_ewma_snaps_on_opponent_advance
nodes.summary: Verifies the win-rate EWMA series resets (snaps) to the raw value at the exact iteration where the opponent advances, avoiding carry-over smoothing from the previous opponent.
